query: Identify top 10 TPC-H customers by lifetime value in market segment 'BUILDING', then for each customer generate a personalized retention narrative referencing their order pattern.

step_1_sql.query: SELECT c.c_custkey, c.c_name, SUM(o.o_totalprice) AS lifetime_value, COUNT(o.o_orderkey) AS order_count FROM customer c JOIN orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey WHERE c.c_mktsegment = 'BUILDING' GROUP BY c.c_custkey, c.c_name ORDER BY lifetime_value DESC LIMIT 10

step_2_consumer.task: Generate a retention narrative for each customer referencing their LTV and order count
